At eef z=1.01 the bottle base reached plate top, and release on predicate fire with bottle still upright in gripper. Pi0 pick worked first try with full task language 'Put the wine bottle on the plate'. No teleport primitives used; pure physics. Total 10 commands, 1 attempt.
